base_prompt:
Reimagine this image as a modern, professionally photographed product advertisement.
Keep the exact same product concept, name, and visual idea, but transform it into a high-end contemporary product photo.
The product should look real, well-designed, and commercially produced, not like a crude Photoshop collage.
Maintain the original joke and concept, but redesign the packaging and composition so it looks like a modern retail product from today.
Style:
• professional studio product photography
• modern packaging design
• clean typography
• realistic lighting and shadows
• sharp focus
• premium materials and printing
• subtle reflections and depth
Composition:
• SQUARE FORMAT (1:1) - product centered and composed to fill the square frame
• No portrait or landscape orientation; the image must be square
• centered product hero shot filling the square
• Must be in color
• minimal studio background (white, gradient, or soft color)
• advertising-quality lighting
• cinematic product styling
Important:
Do not change the product idea, characters, or humor.
Only upgrade the design, realism, lighting, and photography to look like a modern commercial product launch.

PRODUCT CONTEXT:

products.name: Actioncat 2000
products.description: Tired of your cat coming home every morning roughed up by neighborhood cats? Well throw away the Friskies and 9 Lives - Action Cat 2000 will turn your cat into a lion! Anabolic steroids may be illegal in the U.S., but not for cats! AC 2000 is chock full of 23 exotic steroids that give your cat the energy and freakish strength he needs to survive - and it also comes with a combat helmet and matching full body cat armor. After just six weeks on the Action Cat 2000 feeding and injection program, your cat will more than triple his body size and become a violent force to contend with around the neighborhood. Action Cat 2000. Turning cats into lions since 1998.

products.name: "Goin' Postal!" Family Board Game
products.description: New from Milton Bradley, it's "Goin' Postal!" The fun new game that simulates the depressing life of a postal worker. Sort mail! Memorize zip codes! Wear black socks with shorts! It's all in here. Now you can challenge the entire family to an all-out postal duel to see who's craziest! Each player begins with an AK-47 assault rifle to kill co-workers... but only ONE mailcarrier can survive! Will it be you? "Goin Postal!" Because those sons of bitches had it coming.

products.name: Rats Live In My Butthole, by Danielle Steel
products.description: Unwavering love. Rats. Buttholes. Ms. Steel's new novel has it all! It's the amazing story of young architect Michael Hillyard and artist Nancy McAllister. The two are determined to get married despite the fact that rats somehow keep showing up in Michael's butthole. Then, minutes before their wedding, Nancy makes a grim discovery about her fiancé and calls the wedding off. Each pursues a new life -- Nancy in California, Michael in New York. But eventually nothing -- and no rodent -- can keep them apart as they keep their vow never to say good-bye. This is perhaps Danielle Steel's most poignant story since Deadly Masturbation.

products.name: Burger King Crazy Burger!
products.description: The latest from the restuarant that promises to Make It Your Way, Burger King has made burgers fun to eat again with The Crazy Burger! We take a fresh seasame seed bun and sandwich it between two juicy, 1/4 pound patties. And that's what makes the Crazy Burger! so crazy. Order your Crazy Burger! today. Or, for a faster, fresher burger, simply ask the folks at Burger King to make your burger the Crazy Burger! Way.

products.name: Man-Sized Kidney Beans
products.description:
Just can't get enough of those good kidney beans?
Haul home a 180-pound silo of Green Giant Man-Sized

products.name: English 101 Creative Writing Paper
products.description: Drinking. TV. Sex. Think of all the things you could be doing instead of laboring over that English 101 short story assignment that's due tomorrow. Well, thanks to the English 101 Creative Writing Paper, freedom's just a click away. This unforgettable tale will take the reader on a rollercoaster ride of suspense, intrigue and passion. Ensuring you an A on that all-important paper you've been too stoned to start. Order the English 101 Creative Writing Paper today.

products.name: Sonic Deer Electrifryer®

Never worry about hitting another deer on the highway.  This unique device detects deer from miles away and emits an electronic signal so intense that it instantly stops deer dead in their tracks before they enter the roadway.  No more expensive car repair bills.  No more crazy deer jumping onto the road at night.
(May require professional installation)

products.name: Official Stupidhead™ Bed
products.description: Now your pet can live it up "Stupidhead™"Style.  Our new bed is the purr-fect place for your kitty to relax and pretend to live the crazy life of Honchie's own Stupidhead™. No more catting around town for your feline.  Your little buddy will be content ot stay home and dream.  (One size fits all- unless your cat's a fatass).

Gas passes through the seat cushion and into the activated charcoal fart filter to remove foul odors.  Never again be afraid to let your gastric gasses blow.  Great when entertaining company.  Now available in chair and couch sizes.  Even works great for gassy guests! Call for couch prices.

No second guessing about when your pet needs to potty or needs to be fed.  Makes training a breeze.  You'll know your pets every thought and desire.  Available for Dogs, Cats, Ferrets, Sloths & now Parrots.  Specify animal type and size.

products.name: Hillbilly Security
products.description: Get you some peace of mind with a personal home security officer from Hillbilly Security. Our field-tested hillbillies will defend your home with the rabid ferocity only years of genetic inbreeding can produce. Trainees are hand-picked from West Virginia's finest Smoky Mountain mining towns. After an intense 6-week boot camp, only the best and brightest are asked to join our ranks. Hillbilly Security Officers come prepared with a front-porch rocking chair, 6-string banjo and Civil War replica musket. So why waste money on an electronic security system that's helpless to protect you? With Hillbilly Security, you get personalized protection that will curse and/or shoot anyone that fucks with your shit, including your asshole neighbors. Hillbilly Security, start the feud!

products.name: Wacky Weed Seed™

And no one will know your little "secret".  Great secondary souce of income.

products.name: Condom in a Bottle™
products.description: ntroducing Condom In A Bottle™, the latest from the Jumbly Park scientists in Sweden. Best of all, Condom In A Bottle™ comes in handy travel-size container. So you can apply it wherever you desire -- the bedroom, a park, even Denny's. Just squeeze and please! Plus, Condom In A Bottle's discreet. Simply peel off the label and folks will naturally assume that you're applying skin lotion, sunscreen or contact lens solution. Order a bottle of Condom In A Bottle right now. (Keep away from open wounds or blisters. Please specify color -- peach, mocha, or day-glo green.)

products.description: How many times have you said to yourself, "Gee, I wish I had a giant inflatable polar bear?" Well, now's the time to turn your dreams into reality. products.name: The Stick

products.name: My Name is Joe, by Joe
products.description:
Long billed as America's quintessential singer/songwriter, Joe delivers the goods with this spectacular release.
The singing is intense, soulful, serious. "Hello, my name is Joe. I have a wife and three kids. I work in the button factory," begins Joe. No one can match Joe's emotion as he continues: "One day, my boss came up to me and said, 'Hey Joe, are you busy?' I said, 'No, heck no!'" 
The album continues on and on like this for 78 glorious minutes. This is an experience not to be missed. Word, my friends. Word.

Demonstrated by Bubbles the Chimp, the world’s authority on poop-throwing, this fun-filled book is a great addition to any anal-stage toddler’s library. Order How to Throw Poop Like A Monkey today.

products.name: Richard Simmons Shake That Fat Ass! Workout Video
products.description: The latest in a long line of proven workout videos, Richard Simmons' Shake That Fat Ass! combines the energy of today's hottest Top-40 hits with the charm and wit of everybody's favorite exercise freak, Richard Simmons. It's fun, fast and inspiring. Full of candid, emotional testimonials, Shake That Fat Ass! will move you like no other exercise video. So order your copy today. And start shakin' that fat ass!

products.name: Wacky Lard Ball
products.description:
It's wacky! It's lard! It's Wacky Lard Ball®!
Holy shit, is this ball fun! With Wacky Lard Ball, you can --  
Bounce it off  the wall! Or bounce it down the hall!
Bounce it through the window! Or under the ladie's stall!
You can bounce it of a cat! You can bounce it in your kitchen!
Bounce it in the playground, but look out for your Josey's rectum!
Why? Because it's Wacky Lard Ball!
That's right, motherfucker! Wacky Lard Ball!

products.name: Discovering The Prettiness Inside, by Red Garrison
products.description:
This new book from self-proclaimed "pretty-ologist" Red Garrison is a
Must read for anyone not feeling as pretty as they should. Red's remarkable story chronicles his rise from a "not-so-pretty" lumberjack to "super-pretty" Abercrombie & Fitch model. His amazing journey will inspire you in ways you have never been inspired. It will touch you in places you have never been touched. Discovering The Prettiness Inside is a must-read for everyone.

products.name: Stone Phillips Action Figure
products.description: Read those scripts. Give a swift "affirmative look-up." Then swing over to camera two with a news "power-look." And whatever you do, don't forget to execute a high-speed "turbo-turn" over to Jane Pauley to find out what's happening in "other news." The Stone Phillips Action Figure, equipped with the exciting, new "Power Glance" feature and the dynamic "Concerned Look" setting will have you winning the battle of the prime-time news magazines. Boost those Nielson Ratings today with your very own Stone Phillips Action Figure. (Look for the Kathy Lee Sweatshop Slave Master action figure sold separately.)

products.name: Aerodeath
products.description: Forget Travelocity. To hell with AA NetSavers. If you're looking for the hottest airfare bargains on the Net, call Aerodeath. Only Aerodeath will fly you and a friend fly anywhere in the world for only $19.99. (Tickets non-refundable.) Aerodeath. Something black in the air.

products.name: Mt. Carmel, The Video Game
products.description: If you were blown away by Quake and Unreal Tournament, just wait until you experience the total carnage of Mt. Carmel, The Video Game. You play Janet Reno, the over-zealous commander of the ATF. Your mission: eradicate David Koresh and his followers by any means necessary. And here's the really fun part: you get to command a staggering arsenal of fully-armed helicopters, ATF agents and flame-throwing tanks, while your opponent is limited to a closet full of shotguns and a bible. Giving you license to unleash total hell on your enemy. If you've been waiting for the next big video game shoot 'em up, order Mt. Carmel today. And start blowing shit up just like Reno in '93.

products.name: The PolyEsther Rolle Love Doll
products.description:
This 100% polyester life-size Esther Rolle replica love doll looks, feels and smells just like everyone's favorite Good Time welfare mom, Florida. 
     The plush, polyester interior of this ebony beauty moves WITH you as you take Ms. Rolle to new levels of sexual discovery.  It's just like the real thing!  PolyEsther Rolle has 7 working orifices to satisfy even the loneliest housing project tenant.  But this curvy love queen is no clam... she actually talks!   Slap her ass, and she lets out a passionate "Dyyyyyy-nnooooo-myyyyyyyte!!!" (Note: we realize this was J.J.'s trademark, but "Good Times" failed to produce any additional catchy slogans for us to use.   Our apologies, in memory of Esther.) 
     So order the PolyEsther Rolle love doll for only $199.99, or stock up with 3 for only $203.27, and you can let the "Good Times Rolle!"

products.name: Pick-A-Scab Lottery Ticket
products.description: The latest in Maine's popular scratch-off games, Pick-A-Scab! combines the thrill of the lottery with the ageless fun of picking scabs. Simply start scratching, and if three of your scabs result in bleeding, you could win up to $2000! Order your Pick-A-Scab ticket today. And pick yourself a winner!

products.name: BumBoards, Inc.
products.description:
Reach your target market with BumBoards®, an advertising medium that takes your message to the street! Through our extensive network of bums, drunks, vagrants, junkies, homeless and the insane, BumBoards® provides a way to get your company's message right in people's faces.
     So lock your doors, pretend not to look and get ready to see results. Our research shows that a whopping 95% of drivers could recall the exact message that was written on a piece of cardboard by their corner homeless guy. Imagine if your message was on there. Just imagine!
     Best of all, BumBoards® works. A recent BumBoards® campaign from Fidelity Investments increased awareness a lot. A whole lot. We're serious.
     Stop wasting your limited ad budgets on outdated media like the Internet and cable television. Call BumBoards® Ask about our cost-effective malt-liquor-for-ad-space specials. See you on the streets.

products.name: Butthole Triumphé
products.description: Butthole Triumphé is the work of renowned sculptor, Henri Ahzmahn. This particular piece of work was inspired by Henri's visit to naval submarine, the U.S.S. Colin Powell. This statue stands tall and proud at 15 feet. It is sure to make the perfect addition to your home or office or paganistic gay orgy.
